channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Why I switched from Cypress to Playwright in 2026
item.description: Cut frontend test flakes 96% with Playwright 1.44 and Vitest 2.0 — real CI costs, migration steps, and the Cypress mistake most teams still make.

item.title: JSON mode isn't your golden ticket
item.description: Cut LLM validation failures 95% with JSON Schema — why JSON mode alone fails in production workflows and how to fix it with validation, transformation, and fallback logic in 2026.

item.title: AI UI tools: speed vs. the rewrite
item.description: Cut component time 65% with AI UI tools — but design tokens, tests, and breakpoints still need humans. Figma Make Design, Cursor, and Radix UI in 2026.

item.title: Build offline-first apps that sync in 2026
item.description: Cut sync time 84% and battery drain 74% with offline-first apps — the intent-store pattern, SQLite WAL, and WorkManager constraints that actually work in unreliable markets 2026.

item.title: K8s to Fly.io: from $3k to $200/month
item.description: Cut cloud costs 91% by moving from EKS to Fly.io — API latency dropped 49%, uptime hit 100%, and we saved $3.5k/month. See the migration steps and benchmarks.

item.title: Signals vs state: does it matter?
item.description: Cut UI re-renders 70% with Preact Signals — bundle size 1.8KB, 0.4ms updates, and works outside frameworks in 2026

item.title: AI tools killed your dev sales cycle
item.description: AI sales cycle for dev tools: how $49/month became $15k deals after reframing the narrative. 60% conversion lift, team-based pricing, and the Go CLI rewrite that cut cold starts to 80ms.

item.title: Branching databases: Neon and PlanetScale fixes that
item.description: Fix database branch errors 60% faster with Neon and PlanetScale 2026 fixes — connection strings, auto-pause, and local Docker traps that most teams miss.

item.title: Row-level security for SaaS in 2026: the surprise cost
item.description: Cut SaaS infra cost 75% by tiering tenants: RLS for small, schema-per-tenant for medium, dedicated DB for large. PostgreSQL 16.2, PgBouncer 1.21, Redis 7.2 benchmarks included.

item.title: Lessons from 3 SaaS price pivots in 2026
item.description: Cut pricing guesswork 50% with real infra costs — 3 pricing models, 3 concrete numbers, and the Stripe webhook that cut churn 10%.

item.title: Ship to Nairobi users: Starlink latency guide 2026
item.description: Cut Nairobi SaaS page load times 70% — Starlink 2026 edge cache with CloudFront Functions, Redis 7.2, and k6 load tests from Kenya

item.title: Webhooks done right: retries that don’t explode in 2026
item.description: Cut 62 % on webhook costs and eliminated 8 % duplicates with Step Functions + Redis 7.2 retries and atomic idempotency in 2026 — the real patterns that replace 2020-era Lambda-only designs.

item.title: When Astro islands shine in 2026
item.description: Cut page load time 75% with Astro islands in 2026 — how we replaced React hydration with static shells and lazy-loaded islands to hit 1.0s TTI on 2G.

item.title: Test AI code without AI tests
item.description: Cut test maintenance 60% with contract tests, property tests, and golden files that validate intent—not AI output—in 2026.

item.title: AI observability isn’t monitoring — here’s why
item.description: The gap between what the docs say and what production needs I spent three days debugging a production incident where our AI feature was returning 18%…

item.title: Reconcile mobile money in 3 days — edge cases Paystack
item.description: Cut false mobile-money discrepancies 97% with a 2-hour tolerance band — MTN MoMo CSV quirks, Airtel duplicates, and the BRIN index that saved 8 minutes per reconcile

item.title: Bootstrapped $5k MRR without ads
item.description: Hit $5k MRR with zero marketing budget — the exact playbook, tools, and spreadsheets used. Learn how Slack integrations, product-led SEO, and team invites drove 40% MoM growth.

item.title: AI code debt: LLM debt vs prompt debt
item.description: Cut AI code debt 60% with LLM debt vs prompt debt — the decision framework, benchmarks, and rollback plan most teams skip

item.title: Pulumi vs Terraform vs OpenTofu in 2026
item.description: Cut IaC licensing risk 100% and save $14/month per CI runner — OpenTofu 1.8.0 vs Terraform 1.9 BSL vs Pulumi Python 3.12 after the HashiCorp fork.

item.title: Pick niches AI won’t eat in 2026
item.description: Survive AI disruption in 2026: pick SaaS niches where human judgment beats bots. Healthcare regulatory reporting in Kenya cut churn 26% and saved $710/year per customer.
